title: Thai Coconut Cream Dessert
description: A rich and creamy Thai dessert made with coconut cream and cracked Japanese-style mochi.
instructions: Combine coconut cream and mochi in a saucepan over medium heat.
Cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring frequently, until the mixture thickens.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Spoon the mixture into bowls and chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
Serve chilled, garnished with toasted coconut flakes if desired.
